湖人新秀控衛Lonzo Ball在拉斯維加斯夏季聯賽期間嶄露頭角，當選了MVP，並率領湖人奪得隊史首個夏季聯賽冠軍。

最近，Ball的長期訓練師以及經紀人Darren Moore在接受采訪時誇讚了Ball的訓練態度。

“他對籃球比賽非常真誠，他不關於其他的事情，他不關心參加派對，他不關心做這個做那個。作為一個球迷，你就希望有這樣的球員，”他說道，“你希望看到一個只在乎比賽的球員，只想泡在球館裡變得更好的球員，只想去學習和贏球的球員，這些才是最重要的，而不是浮華豔世和奢侈的生活，如果你工作努力，那些都會隨之而來的。但他只關心籃球，那對他來說是最重要的事情，我認為，從現在開始到未來十年至十五年，人們將會意識到這一點。”

The Los Angeles Lakers continue weigh options for their backup point guard role with a couple of names emerging on Thursday. Derrick Rose was the biggest one as the Lakers met with him on Thursday, but he wasn’t the only one.

Former Golden State Warriors guard Ian Clark was mentioned as a possibility for the Lakers with them having interest him. According to Mark Medina of the OC Register, the Lakers met with Clark on Thursday as well:

The Lakers met with free-agent guard Ian Clark for 45 minutes on Thursday afternoon, according to a league source familiar with the situation.

The difference between Clark and someone like Rose or Deron Williams is that Clark is younger and has less NBA experience. He is, however, an NBA champion, winning a ring with the Warriors last season. The Lakers reportedly view his championship experience as reason he can be a mentor for Lonzo Ball despite his lack of overall NBA seasons:

The Lakers view the 26-year-old Clark as a good mentor for rookie point guard Lonzo Ball after helping the Warriors win the 2017 NBA championship. After only playing four years in the NBA, Clark still could further cement his career with the Lakers should he have a productive season.

Clark is an interesting possibility for the Lakers as he is capable of playing both guard positions and is an excellent shooter, knocking down 37.4 percent from three-point range. With Magic Johnson and Rob Pelinka seemingly intent on getting someone who can be a mentor for their rookie point guard, however, Clark would seem to be behind guys like Rose and Williams.

If the Lakers see Clark’s playoff and Finals experience as positives it could vault him up the list of potential signees. He is familiar with head coach Luke Walton and his system as well, making a potential fit even easier.

Last season, Clark appeared in 77 games for the Warriors, averaging a career-high 6.8 points.

近年湖人正展開既漫長又艱辛的球隊重建工程，湖人近幾年選秀會都取得較前順位的選秀權，亦揀選了幾名有潛質的年輕球員，今屆榜眼Lonzo Ball在夏季聯賽的表現，大家都有目共睹。而另一位年輕球員Brandon Ingram,大家對他在來季的表現都有很大期望。

Ingram在2016年選秀會以第二順位加盟湖人，上季是他職業生涯第一個賽季，在開季時他的表現未如理想，可是隨著他的進步，開始擔任球隊先發，在上季他曾40次以先發身份上陣。雖然Ingram體格上欠缺對抗性，但他卻是一位很勤力的球員，連湖人總裁Magic Johnson都稱讚他的努力。

「這個人只在乎籃球和勝利，他為人比較靜態，沒有其他興趣。他是一個非常聰明的年輕球員，亦是球隊中最勤力的球員。」

Ingram毫不間斷地練習，Magic都忍不住要說

「他應該要放假。」

除此之外，6呎9吋的Ingram擁有多變的打法，能應付不同位置的進攻和防守，使Magic對他愛不釋手。湖人帝王本身打算以DeMarcus Cousins交易Ingram，可是Magic堅決拒絕，可見Magic對Ingram的未來有很高期望。

「任何人想打他的主意，我都會說"不用了，謝謝。"」

19歲的Ingram上季出場時間平均28.8分鐘，取得9.4分、2.1助攻、4籃板成績。

D'Angelo Russell今季由湖人被交易到籃網，而當時湖人總裁Magic Johnson卻批評他的領導能力。Russell在廣播節目《The Woj Pod》接受Adrian Wojnarowski訪問時表示，至今仍不明白Magic的批評。

「我已經擺脫你(Magic Johnson)的掌控，我已經與你沒有關係，現在我去了一支新球隊，我不明白他的批評，至今都不明白。」

就在選秀會前兩日，湖人把21歲的Russell和Timofey Mozgov交易籃網的Brook Lopez和籃網的選秀權(選了Kyle Kuzma)。而在選秀會上湖人在第二順位選了Lonzo Ball後，Magic在訪問批評Russell的領導力不足，Lonzo才是他理想的領袖。

除此之外，Russell由2015年以榜眼身份加盟湖人，到現在轉到籃網，他認為兩支球隊的風格截然不同，他覺得目前他正展開生涯另一個階段，現時效力一支有規律的球隊會有助他取得成功。

「自由。我認為在洛杉磯，這不像大學。而布魯克林的模式比較像大學，每天你都有時間表，知道每段時間要做甚麼。」

「尤其當你還是一個年輕球員，有這樣的模式，肯定會進步得很快，因為這是你熟悉的模式。高中的時候你有一定的模式，大學亦有一定的模式，但當你打NBA的時候，你不會再有那麼規律，這是截然不同。但當你重回這種有規律的環境，這又變得不同了。」

現時Russell到了籃網，他將要與同樣是控衛的林書豪合作，對此Russell曾講過他們不會再有位置之分，而對於這種合作模式，他亦感到很舒適。

Lakers news: D’Angelo Russell ‘wanted to play defense’

At the 2015 NBA Draft, the Los Angeles Lakers selected D’Angelo Russell with the second overall pick. The Ohio State product was viewed as Kobe Bryant’s successor, but after just two seasons, he was traded to the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for Brook Lopez and Kyle Kuzma.

While there were heated debates about the trade, Brooklyn will provide Russell with a fresh start. In his young career, Russell has shown his scoring abilities but will need to improve the rest of his game. When asked about defense, Russell had the following to say according to Zach Lowe of ESPN:

“I wanted to play defense in L.A.,” Russell said, “but I felt like I had to score every chance I got for us to be relevant.”

It is not an ideal answer from Russell, but it was not a stable environment for him in Los Angeles as well. During Russell’s rookie season, it marked Kobe Bryant’s farewell tour and he was in former head coach Byron Scott’s doghouse. While he showed potential under head coach Luke Walton in his sophomore season, the Lakers acquired a former All-Star center, a stretch-four prospect, and cap space for next year’s free agency.

With Russell no longer with the Lakers, all eyes are on Lonzo Ball, who was named the Las Vegas Summer League Most Valuable Player after averaging a near triple-double. Along with Brandon Ingram, President of Basketball Operations Magic Johnson and general manager Rob Pelinka believe there is a path to signing two superstars to surround their young core.

NBALakers news: Brandon Ingram says his ‘mentality has totally changed’

In the 2016 NBA Draft, the Los Angeles Lakers selected forward Brandon Ingram with the second overall pick. It was the second straight year the team drafted in that position and may have found their future face of the franchise in the process.

Although Ingram got off to a slow start to his rookie season last year, the Duke product turned it on after the All-Star break and finished strong. The young forward was so impressive in the final stretch of games during his rookie campaign that Magic Johnson and Rob Pelinka appear convinced the team have found a star in the making.

With the start Ingram’s second season right around the corner, the soon-to-be 20-year-old is focusing on improving his game, body, and mentality this summer. The Lakers forward recently talked about his offseason work and his efforts to change his mindset moving forward in an interview, via BiPro USA Blog.

“I’m in the weight room more this summer than I have been in the past. My mentality has totally changed,” Ingram said. “My new coaches have really helped a lot with my weightlifting. It’s the same routine for me every single day now.”

Ingram will be a player to watch on the Lakers roster next season as he tries to take the next step in his development. The versatile forward will have the advantage of having better players around him during the 2017-18 campaign with rookie Lonzo Ball coming in as well as Lakers newcomers Kentavious Caldwell-Pope and veteran center Brook Lopez.

In terms of Ingram’s body, the second-year forward hopes that the work he puts in during his time in the weight room this summer will help improve his explosiveness on the court.

“I’m making sure everything I do in the weight room translates to the court, whatever makes my body more explosive,” Ingram said. “Weighted step-ups are great because they simulate jumping off of one foot, which I do in games all the time.”

Ingram and the Lakers will head into training camp next month with the spotlight being on the former Blue Devils star and Ball. The two promising young players could be a dynamic duo in Los Angeles for many years to come with the front office having high expectations for what these two can accomplish in a Lakers uniform.

Last summer the Los Angeles Lakers made the decision to sign Timofey Mozgov and Luol Deng to massive four-year contracts. Now as the new regime looks to clear out room for two maximum contracts next summer, those deals are a major impediment.

The Lakers were able to get out of Mozgov’s contract, shipping him to the Brooklyn Nets, but it cost them D’Angelo Russell. Trading away Deng would cost the Lakers a similar promising young piece such as Brandon Ingram, who the Lakers do not want to give up just for the sake of cap space.

The other option for the Lakers would be to stretch Deng’s contract. If they planned on doing so, they have only until August 31 to do so for it to include this season’s salary according to Bleacher Report’s Eric Pincus:

The deadline to stretch Deng’s full $54 million is August 31. The Lakers would still owe him his salary but Deng would be paid over the next seven seasons at $7.7 million per year. After August, Los Angeles cannot stretch Deng’s salary for the 2017-18 season, but they can spread his final two seasons ($36.8 million total) at $7.4 million over five.

Pincus adds that by waiting to stretch Deng’s contract, the Lakers would give themselves a little bit more cap space:

Stretching Deng would clear almost $10 million from the team’s salary cap next summer. By waiting until after the deadline this month, the Lakers would gain roughly $352,000 of additional spending power.

The Lakers are unlikely to stretch Deng before this upcoming deadline as they would be better served trying to find a way to trade him. If they are unable to, there is no harm in keeping him on the roster for this season and then stretching him next summer if they are able to bring in two players like they hope to.

The Deng and Mozgov deals were ill-advised when they happened and now they have made things even more difficult for the Lakers moving forward. However, there are still ways around it and the franchise will be sure to figure out the best one.

湖人在當地時間8月31日因違反違規引誘規則被聯盟罰款50萬美元，後來據NBA老牌記者Peter Vecsey報導，溜馬老闆Herb Simon對於這一處罰結果並不滿意，可能會選擇動用法律手段起訴NBA和湖人。

今天，溜馬官方就此事發表聲明。聲明中，Simon表示此前的報導並非事實。

Simon寫道：“與此前的一份報導恰恰相反，我想要強調的是，無論是我，還是印第安納溜馬隊，都從未考慮過就最近的處罰決定動用法律手段起訴NBA和湖人。我們同意NBA的調查結果，我們想要將這個問題拋在腦後。儘管目前溜馬的處境十分艱難，但我們很幸運的是能夠得到Victor Oladipo以及Domantas Sabonis這兩名出色的球員，他們年輕而充滿天賦，再加上我們回歸的自由球員以及在這個休賽期獲得的其他球員，我們的球隊和球迷均得到了巨大保障。”

新勞資協議增加了雙向合約球員，這種類型的球員來自發展聯盟，每支NBA球隊可以擁有兩名雙向合約球員，也就是說可以擁有17名球員，並且可以臨時徵召雙向合約球員。

但是雙向合約是有限制的，這種類型的球員可以參加NBA球隊的訓練營和45天的例行賽。一旦達到45天的限制，那麼球隊就不能再持有球員的雙向合約。45天的時間包括球員在NBA球隊的激活名單上的日子、與球隊一起出征的日子或參加球隊活動的日子，比如訓練和試訓。但是在發展聯盟的日子，以及在NBA球隊的非激活名單上的日子，都不計算在45天之內。

雙向合約球員在NBA球隊打球時可以拿到更多的薪水，在發展聯盟打球時的薪水也能翻倍，這雖然相比去海外打球所拿的薪水還是要少很多，但是至少為他們創造了額外的進入NBA的機會。

而從NBA球隊的角度來看，雙向合約比NBA合約更划算——球員只有在NBA球隊時才能得到NBA薪水。而在下放和徵召這方面，NBA球隊也擁有完全的權利。

Luke Walton was 'chief recruiter' for Lakers to sign Andrew Bogut

Bogut is known as one of the better defensive big men in the league and is also an exceptional passer.

The Vertical’s Shams Charania, who first reported the signing, writes that Bogut wanted to reunite with head coach Luke Walton. He played for Walton when the Los Angeles head coach was an assistant for the Golden State Warriors.

Here is what Bogut said about Walton when he became an NBA head coach:

“Luke’s a very smart guy, a very high basketball IQ as a player and as a coach. He did a phenomenal job for us filling in for Steve and I think that he’ll do a good job.”

According to reports, Walton was a “chief recruiter” of the 32-year-old former No. 1 overall pick.

The Australian-born player also apparently received interest from the Boston Celtics, Cleveland Cavaliers and Minnesota Timberwolves. However, he preferred the “vibe” from the Lakers. He will fill their final roster spot.

He is expected to provide veteran leadership for Los Angeles. During the upcoming season, the frontcourt for the team will be loaded. Earlier this offseason, they landed veteran Brook Lopez and will also return 20-year-old Ivica Zubac.

Considering many expected Bogut to sign with a contender, it was a surprise to see he joined a team that landed in the lottery last season. However, the recruiting prowess of Walton (teamed up with Magic Johnson and Rob Pelinka) is certainly worth monitoring moving forward.
